members.name: ExpandMode
members.summary: Defines how minimum size is determined based on the texture's size.

members.name: StretchMode
members.summary: Controls the texture's behavior when resizing the node's bounding rectangle.

values.name: EXPAND_FIT_HEIGHT
values.summary: The width of the texture will be ignored. Minimum height will be equal to the current width. Useful for vertical layouts, e.g. inside [VBoxContainer].

values.name: EXPAND_FIT_HEIGHT_PROPORTIONAL
values.summary: Same as [constant EXPAND_FIT_HEIGHT], but keeps texture's aspect ratio.

values.name: EXPAND_FIT_WIDTH
values.summary: The height of the texture will be ignored. Minimum width will be equal to the current height. Useful for horizontal layouts, e.g. inside [HBoxContainer].

values.name: EXPAND_FIT_WIDTH_PROPORTIONAL
values.summary: Same as [constant EXPAND_FIT_WIDTH], but keeps texture's aspect ratio.

values.name: EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
values.summary: The size of the texture won't be considered for minimum size calculation, so the [TextureRect] can be shrunk down past the texture size.

values.name: EXPAND_KEEP_SIZE
values.summary: The minimum size will be equal to texture size, i.e. [TextureRect] can't be smaller than the texture.

values.name: STRETCH_KEEP
values.summary: The texture keeps its original size and stays in the bounding rectangle's top-left corner.

values.name: STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT
values.summary: Scale the texture to fit the node's bounding rectangle, but maintain the texture's aspect ratio.

values.name: STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
values.summary: Scale the texture to fit the node's bounding rectangle, center it and maintain its aspect ratio.

values.name: STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_COVERED
values.summary: Scale the texture so that the shorter side fits the bounding rectangle. The other side clips to the node's limits.

values.name: STRETCH_KEEP_CENTERED
values.summary: The texture keeps its original size and stays centered in the node's bounding rectangle.

values.name: STRETCH_SCALE
values.summary: Scale to fit the node's bounding rectangle.

values.name: STRETCH_TILE
values.summary: Tile inside the node's bounding rectangle. [b]Note:[/b] [constant STRETCH_TILE] mode is not supported for [member texture] set to an [AtlasTexture] with non-zero [member AtlasTexture.margin].

constants.name: EXPAND_KEEP_SIZE
constants.summary: The minimum size will be equal to texture size, i.e. [TextureRect] can't be smaller than the texture.
